name: Avatar

variants.name: image
variants.description: Shows a person's photo. Preferred when image is available.

variants.name: initials
variants.description: Shows two-letter initials (first + last name) when no image is available.

variants.name: skeleton
variants.description: Circular skeleton placeholder while content is loading.

initials.note: Always two letters: first + last name initial, e.g. LH for Linda Hall

on_click.note: Only use when triggering user menu

usage_rules.rule: Initials must be exactly two letters
usage_rules.detail: Always use first name initial + last name initial. e.g. LH for Linda Hall. Never use one letter or more than two.
Avatar is not interactive except when used to trigger the user menu. Do not add click handlers for other purposes.
Avoid using avatar when it is likely that no image will be available, e.g. for patient records. Use an alternative representation instead.

usage_rules.rule: Image is always cropped to circle
usage_rules.detail: Images are cropped to a circle. The image should be a square or close to square for best results.

accessibility.aria_label: Required when used as image — describe the person shown

confidence_blockers: If initials are provided as a single letter or more than two, flag as usage_rule violation.
If avatar is given an onClick other than user menu trigger, flag and ask for clarification.
agent_instructions.token_resolution: Skeleton state uses Surface.Skeleton token, not a custom color.

embedding_text: Avatar component. Represents a person with photo image or two-letter initials when no image available. Sizes: 40px large, 32px small. Always circular pill radius. Non-interactive except for user menu trigger. Skeleton state for loading. Initials must be two letters first and last name.
